gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the generated GitHub-governance sidecar support, command ordering, release-bundle auto-inclusion, equivalent-path allowance, conflict rejection, and shared single-sidecar path validation; no findings were reported.
scope: document_kv_cache.benchmark_plan CLI/config/record generation, benchmark-plan tests, README workflow documentation
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -> 117 passed
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Benchmark plans can generate GitHub governance sidecars and auto-bundle them as release governance evidence.
why: Release bundle command plans should generate the GitHub governance evidence they need instead of requiring an out-of-band sidecar path.
